title: IT'S NOT REAL
description: it's not real, it's all in your head.
body:
IT'S NOT REAL

_It never was, 
It's all in your head_

![it's okay.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177be5f5a3880343ea195fdd538627f49b557783_0.webp)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This mod adds multiple "anomalies" to your world, they are NOT REAL.

You are experiencing auditory and visual hallucinations, they are NOT REAL.

Your mind is toying with you, IT'S NOT REAL.

Do not look, they are NOT REAL, stay away from them, they are NOT REAL

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**PLEASE, DO REPORT ANY BUGS**

**MOD IS _NOT_ INTENDED FOR MULTIPLAYER,**

**MOD SPAWNRATES _ARE ALL CONFIGURABLE_, 
SO DO NOT COMPLAIN IF IT'S TOO SLOW FOR YOUR LIKING.**

**THIS IS A COMPLETE RECODE OF THE "LEGACY" IT'S NOT REAL.**

**THIS MOD HAS A PROGRESSION TYPE SYSTEM,
THE MORE NEW ENTITIES YOU ENCOUNTER, THE MORE NEW ENTITIES CAN SPAWN.**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

had to do sum dumb shi at the top of the desc to please modrinth moderation, dunno if it makes sense but if it works it works :)
